description: One period (a year) of an X account, extracted by a single reader. Monthly breakdown drills down inside the year. Tags are free-form here; a later pass unifies them into a shared taxonomy so they can be tracked across periods.

era_label.description: A short human label for what this year was about, e.g. 'Journalist · AAJA' or 'AI builder · shipping'.

content_themes.description: What they actually posted about this year, weighted.

example_quote.description: A verbatim tweet from this year.

free_tags.description: Free-form topic/stance/mode tags for this year (lowercase, short). Don't worry about matching other years — unification happens later.

voice_reading.description: Qualitative reading of how they wrote this year, grounded in the supplied computed stats (sentence length, emoji/hashtag/link/reply rates, vocabulary). Note what the numbers imply about register and mode.

notable_tweets.description: 2-4 tweets that best capture this year.

monthly.description: Month-level drill-down for months that have tweets. Keep each entry light.

focus.description: One line: what this month was about.

note.description: Any shift, spike, or notable event this month; empty string if unremarkable.
